summary: Create comprehensive unit test suite for OpenPrint Dashboard React components using React Testing Library and Vitest. Establish testing infrastructure, achieve 70% code coverage, and ensure all critical user flows are validated through automated tests.

user_stories.i_want: automated tests for the LoginForm component
user_stories.so_that: I can ensure user authentication works correctly with valid and invalid credentials
acceptance_criteria: Test renders email and password input fields
Test validates form submission with valid credentials
Test displays error message with invalid credentials
Test shows loading state during submission
Test prevents submission with empty fields
Test password field has minlength of 8 characters

user_stories.i_want: automated tests for the JobList component
user_stories.so_that: I can verify print jobs display correctly and filtering functions work
acceptance_criteria: Test renders loading skeleton when isLoading is true
Test renders error state when error prop is provided
Test renders empty state when jobs array is empty
Test renders job entries table with all columns
Test displays job status badges correctly
Test filters jobs by status
Test handles job selection checkbox changes
Test calls onJobClick when job row is clicked
Test shows cancel button for queued jobs
Test shows retry button for failed jobs

user_stories.i_want: automated tests for the DeviceList component
user_stories.so_that: I can ensure devices and printers display with correct status indicators
acceptance_criteria: Test renders device stats cards
Test displays online/offline status indicators
Test renders devices in table view
Test renders devices in grid view
Test filters devices by status (online/offline/error)
Test filters devices by type (agent/printer)
Test search functionality filters by device name
Test shows empty state when no devices exist
Test toggles between table and grid view modes

user_stories.i_want: automated tests for the DocumentList component
user_stories.so_that: I can verify document management operations function correctly
acceptance_criteria: Test renders document statistics (total count, storage, encrypted)
Test displays upload button and toggles upload form
Test renders document grid with document cards
Test filters documents by search query
Test shows empty state when no documents exist
Test shows loading state during initial fetch
Test displays error state on API failure
Test pagination controls work correctly

user_stories.i_want: automated tests for the Dashboard home page
user_stories.so_that: I can verify statistics display and data aggregation works correctly
acceptance_criteria: Test renders all stat cards (Total Jobs, Active Devices, Pages Today, Completed Jobs)
Test displays loading state while fetching data
Test renders JobChart component with statistics
Test renders RecentActivity feed
Test shows trend indicators on stat cards
Test handles failed API calls gracefully

user_stories.so_that: tests can run reliably in CI/CD pipelines
acceptance_criteria: Vitest configuration with jsdom environment
Test setup file with global cleanup
Coverage reporting enabled
npm run test executes all tests
Coverage threshold of at least 70% enforced
Tests run in watch mode for local development

user_stories.so_that: tests can isolate components from external dependencies
acceptance_criteria: Mock wrappers for React Query
Mock router context for navigation components
Mock API responses for backend services
Custom render function with providers
Test data factories for common entities

user_stories.so_that: code changes are validated automatically before deployment
acceptance_criteria: Tests run on every pull request
Test results reported in GitHub Actions
Coverage badges updated automatically
Failed tests block merge
Test artifacts downloadable for debugging

functional_requirements.title: LoginForm Test Coverage
functional_requirements.description: Create comprehensive tests for LoginForm component including rendering, validation, submission handling, loading states, and error display

functional_requirements.title: JobList Test Coverage
functional_requirements.description: Create tests for JobList component covering loading states, error handling, empty states, job rendering, filtering, selection, and action buttons

functional_requirements.title: DeviceList Test Coverage
functional_requirements.description: Create tests for Devices component covering stats display, status indicators, view modes (table/grid), filtering by status/type, and search functionality

functional_requirements.title: DocumentList Test Coverage
functional_requirements.description: Create tests for Documents component covering statistics display, upload toggle, document grid, search filtering, pagination, and loading/error states

functional_requirements.title: DashboardHome Test Coverage
functional_requirements.description: Create tests for DashboardHome component covering stat cards, loading states, JobChart integration, and RecentActivity feed

functional_requirements.title: Vitest Configuration
functional_requirements.description: Configure vitest.config.ts with proper test environment, coverage settings, and global setup

functional_requirements.title: Test Utilities
functional_requirements.description: Create test utilities including custom render function, mock wrappers for React Query and React Router, and test data factories

functional_requirements.title: CI/CD Test Integration
functional_requirements.description: Integrate test execution into GitHub Actions workflow with coverage reporting and artifact collection

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Test suite should complete execution within 60 seconds
Minimum code coverage for tested components
Tests should be isolated and independent
non_functional_requirements.metric: Each test must be runnable independently

non_functional_requirements.requirement: No flaky tests due to timing or async issues

non_functional_requirements.metric: Descriptive assertion messages for all tests

api_endpoints.description: Jobs listing endpoint for JobList tests
Job cancellation endpoint for JobList tests
Job retry endpoint for JobList tests
Devices listing endpoint for DeviceList tests
Documents listing endpoint for DocumentList tests
Document upload endpoint for DocumentList tests
Environment report endpoint for Dashboard tests

risks.risk: Component dependencies on React Query may require complex mocking
risks.mitigation: Create custom wrapper components and test utilities to provide mocked query client

risks.risk: Async operations may cause flaky tests
risks.mitigation: Use waitFor and findBy queries from React Testing Library for async assertions

risks.risk: Tests may break when component implementations change
risks.mitigation: Focus on testing user behavior and accessibility rather than implementation details

risks.risk: Global state (localStorage, sessionStorage) may interfere between tests
risks.mitigation: Clear all storage in beforeEach/afterEach hooks in test setup

risks.risk: Mocking file uploads for DocumentList tests
risks.mitigation: Create mock File objects and use MSW (Mock Service Worker) or fetch mocks for API calls

implementation_phases.name: Test Infrastructure Setup
tasks: Create test-utils.ts with custom render function and providers
Create test data factories for common entities
Add test setup for global cleanup and mocks

implementation_phases.name: LoginForm Tests
tasks: Test component renders with email and password fields
Test form submission with mock onSubmit callback
Test loading state when isLoading prop is true

implementation_phases.name: JobList Tests
tasks: Test job table rendering with mock data
Test cancel and retry action buttons

implementation_phases.name: DeviceList Tests
tasks: Test stats cards rendering (total agents, printers, online/offline)
Test status indicator colors and labels

implementation_phases.name: DocumentList Tests
tasks: Test statistics cards (total documents, storage, encrypted)
Test upload button and form toggle

implementation_phases.name: Dashboard Home Tests
tasks: Test stat cards rendering (Total Jobs, Active Devices, Pages Today, Completed Jobs)
Test loading state while data fetches
Test JobChart component receives correct data
Test RecentActivity component receives correct activities
Test trend indicators on stat cards

implementation_phases.name: CI/CD Integration
tasks: Create GitHub Actions workflow for running tests
Configure test results blocking on PR
